# Quarantine/unquarantine lifecycle — all state persists across process boundaries
# because $HOME/.orbiter/settings.json survives between exec calls.

# Quarantine an integration
exec orbiter quarantine git
stdout 'git is now quarantined'

# Survey reflects quarantine state (persisted to settings.json)
exec orbiter survey git
stdout 'QUARANTINED'
stdout 'manual quarantine'
stdout 'orbiter unquarantine git'

# Double-quarantine is a no-op
exec orbiter quarantine git
stdout 'already quarantined'

# Remove quarantine
exec orbiter unquarantine git
stdout 'quarantine removed'

# Survey no longer shows quarantine
exec orbiter survey git
! stdout 'QUARANTINED'

# Unquarantine of a non-quarantined brand is informational, not an error
exec orbiter unquarantine git
stdout 'not quarantined'

# Vessel alias for unquarantine works identically
exec orbiter quarantine golang
stdout 'golang is now quarantined'

exec orbiter vessel unquarantine golang
stdout 'quarantine removed'

exec orbiter survey golang
! stdout 'QUARANTINED'
